full_name: Steel, Bars, Forgings, and Tubing, 0.80Cr-1.8Ni-0.25Mo (0.38-0.43C), Consumable Electrode Vacuum Melted (4340 type)
version_year: see SAE catalog for current revision
scope: Premium consumable-electrode vacuum-melted AISI 4340-type low-alloy steel bars, forgings, and tubing for high-strength aerospace structural parts.

chemical_composition.note: Nominal composition of AISI 4340 as widely published by independent sources (MatWeb, ASM, AISI/SAE grade data); values in wt%.

mechanical_properties.note: Typical room-temperature properties vary strongly with heat treatment; representative values for quenched and tempered condition from independent datasheets.
mechanical_properties.tensile_strength_ultimate: 1240-1980 MPa (180-287 ksi) depending on temper; ~1860 MPa (270 ksi) at low tempering

license_note: Alloy composition/property data for AISI 4340 steel is widely published by independent free sources (MatWeb, ASM, AISI/SAE grade tables). Not reproduced from the copyrighted AMS document; AMS 6414 designation used only as an identifier.
